name: cursor-tsc-runner-extension
description: Runs yarn tsc in predefined folders and shows results in a sidebar webview view.

cursorTscRunner.autoRunOnStart.description: Run type checks automatically once when the extension activates.

cursorTscRunner.runOnSave.description: Automatically rerun checks when relevant files are saved inside configured target folders.

cursorTscRunner.relevantRerunDebounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before rerun after a relevant save.

cursorTscRunner.maxParallelChecks.description: Maximum number of folders checked in parallel during a full run.

cursorTscRunner.targetFolders.description: Workspace-relative paths (folders) in which `yarn tsc` is run, in order. Unsafe or absolute paths are ignored.

cursorTscRunner.relevantExtensions.description: File extensions considered relevant for save-triggered reruns.

cursorTscRunner.resultsFontSize.description: Font size in pixels for the TSC Runner results panel.

cursorTscRunner.resultPadding.description: Padding in pixels for the panel body and each result row.

cursorTscRunner.resultsRowStripeEvenBack.description: Optional CSS background for even rows (e.g. hex or rgb). Leave empty for default theming.

cursorTscRunner.resultsRowStripeOddBackg.description: Optional CSS background for odd rows. Leave empty for default theming.

cursorTscRunner.resultsRowBackgroundSucc.description: Optional CSS background for successful rows. Leave empty for default.

cursorTscRunner.resultsRowBackgroundFail.description: Optional CSS background for failed rows. Leave empty for default.

cursorTscRunner.resultsRowBackgroundMiss.description: Optional CSS background for missing-folder rows. Leave empty for default.

cursorTscRunner.resultsRowBackgroundIdle.description: Optional CSS background for idle rows. Leave empty for default.

cursorTscRunner.resultsRowBackgroundRunn.description: Optional CSS background for running rows. Leave empty for default.

cursorTscRunner.githubToken.description: Personal access token for github.com (repo scope for private repos). Optional for public repos; higher API limits with token. Prefer User settings, do not commit.

cursorTscRunner.githubApiBaseUrl.description: GitHub API base URL, e.g. https://api.github.com or https://HOSTNAME/api/v3 for Enterprise. Empty uses https://api.github.com for github.com remotes.

cursorTscRunner.githubActionsRefreshMs.description: How often to refresh GitHub Actions status in the results panel (milliseconds).

cursorTscRunner.githubCiWorkflowPath.description: Repository-relative path of the GitHub Actions workflow used for per-folder CI bubbles (jobs named eo-ci|row|segment|slug). If the workflow is missing, the extension falls back to the latest run of any workflow.

cursorTscRunner.githubCiAdditionalWorkfl.description: More repository-relative workflow paths (same repo as workspace root only). Shown in Main CI (non-folder jobs) alongside githubCiWorkflowPath. Omit or set to [] to disable. Duplicates of the primary path are ignored.

cursorTscRunner.githubCiDebug.description: Log merged GitHub Actions job names to the Cursor TSC Runner output channel (for troubleshooting per-folder CI bubbles).

commands.title: Cursor TSC Runner: Run yarn tsc
